content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于8月7日 19:50 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年8月21日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 修复了「相位对弈」中「唤醒体试训」无法进入的问题。
● 优化了语言设置为英语时的以下文本表述问题：
    ○ 修复了造物Divine Oracle描述、部分敌方唤醒体觉醒提示中Rouse错误措辞为Awaken的问题
        ■ 优化了唤醒体达芙戴尔部分卡牌描述翻译的措辞。
        ■ 修复了剧情对话中守密人性别相关人称和称呼错误显示的问题。
        ■ 修复了剧情对话中雕塑家协会、提灯教会、生命教廷等文本错误翻译的问题。

**V2.3.0.5 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on Agugust 7 at 19:50. You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on August 21, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
● Fixed the issue where players couldn't enter "Awakener Trial" in Traphase.
● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
    ○ Fixed the the incorrect term translation "Awaken" to "Rouse" in some combat prompt messages and the Relic "Divine Oracle".
        ■ Optimized Awakener Daffodil's card description translations.
        ■ Fixed incorrect gender-related pronouns and titles for the Keeper in story dialogues, e.g. KeeperSir -> Mr. Keeper, KeeperSister -> Miss Keeper, and "You cannot force She." -> "You cannot force her." 
        ■ Corrected mistranslations in story dialogues for several terms: "The Sculptors' Association," "Church of the Lightbearers," and "Chantry of Life."
